annotation_target.structure: Lyrical peak descent — graceful fall from peak, ornamental close
teaching_goals: the descent should feel like a natural exhale after the peak
style_tips: the ending should be pp — after the peak, quiet

teaching_notes.note: The descent from the peak: controlled, beautiful, inevitable.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 37–40 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2 (continuation of mm. 33–36), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 37–40 and describe how this peak resolves.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 37–40.
Measures 37–40 descend from the peak — the melody returns toward the midrange with a graceful fall. The ornamental detail softens as the phrase closes. Let me loop mm. 37–40.
Chopin Nocturne mm. 37–40: descent from lyrical peak, graceful melodic fall, phrase closes. Pairs with mm. 33–36.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
